title: チケゾー☆フレンドシップ！

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I lost AGAIN?!

Hearing a scream, I race to the arcade and find
Winning Ticket yelling about something.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I just can't seem to win at this motion control
game! And I'm supposed to be good at physical
stuff!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Those monsters are way too hard. Even the three of us combined are no match for them.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, we got to play plenty today! Should we
head back?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No! I can't quit now! I won't stop till I beat it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh, can't we save it for another day?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No way! We ate an amazing parfait, bought a ton of stuff, and even rode a boat in the park! We had a blast today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So I wanted to end the day on a happy note! This
whole day should be one huge, wonderful
memory!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Tickezo! You really inspired me just now!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Then let's get back to it!

The trio lines up in front of the huge game
monitor, and an intense battle erupts the moment
a colossal dragon appears.

text_block_list.name: Fierce Dragon
text_block_list.text: ROOOAAARRR!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My magic isn't working! ...Scarlet, it went that
way!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Grr! I'll act as bait! Regroup while I hold its
attention!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Don't you DARE touch Scarleeeet!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Take this! FULL POWER IMPAAAACT!

text_block_list.name: Fierce Dragon
text_block_list.text: GRAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why'd you save me? You could have beaten it if
you left me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm not just gonna throw your life away! Without
all three of us, it'd never be a perfect memory!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I want all of us to smile when we remember today. That's what making memories is all about!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tickezo...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Let's take that monster down
together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna make a perfect memory too! Let's fight to
the very end!

With their hearts united as one, the three of them
perfectly synchronize their actions and beat the
game!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We did it! We won! Nothing can stop us when
we're together!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Our teamwork is second to none! I'm so glad
we toughed it out!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YEAH! We ruuule!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank yoouuu! I'll never forget this for as long as I live! This is the best day ever!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Before we forget, how about we take some
photo stickers?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Having a pic to remember would rock! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You really want to remember how hard
you're crying right now?
choice_data_list: Why not take a second to compose yourself?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I want to, but the tears just keep comiiing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You can cry all you want! I think happy tears
make unforgettable memories too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAH! Spe, you're so, so, soooo SWEEEET!

We take some pictures with Winning Ticket's eyes
still red. Everyone's emotions come out clear as
day, making these some great photos!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooh, shall we go get a bite to eat? I'm starving!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'll have two hamburger sets and an extra
large nugget combo. Oh and...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow, Spe! I won't let you out-eat me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't even try to compete if I were you. Her
stomach's like a black hole.

Winning Ticket eats herself into a food coma, and
we end up having to skip the photo stickers.
